name: Project VTS
short_description: Project VTS is a real-time TD game. You'll need to build your defence around your base and defend against different enemies from all directions in various terrains of the alien planet.Use your turrets, obstacles, power supply, resource facillities to defend your base.
detailed_description:
Project VTS is a real-time TD game. You'll need to build your defence around your base and defend against different enemies from all directions in various terrains of the alien planet.Use your turrets, obstacles, power supply, resource facillities to defend your base,and complete a variety of missions to achieve your goals on the planet.

- Observe the battlefield from top view
- Use variants of buildings to build your defence
- Surge your basement and push forwards higher operation level



Please note that the English language may have inaccurate translations while the english is translated by the author which is not quite good at English, please submit any suggest in discussions
